name_en: True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
name_cn:
True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Mini BOOK TOTE Handbag (with shoulder strap)
Exclusive channel goods, the most cost-effective blue D mini shoulder strap version
Blue and beige Oblique print embroidery
Number: S5573CRIW_M928
Size Information
Size: 21.5x13x7.5 cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick
Shoulder strap length: 68-124 cm
Top of strap to top of bag: 31-60 cm
Weight: approx. 289g
This mini size handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Early Spring collection, carefully designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri to enrich the classic Dior Book Tote series.
Adorned with the brand's classic blue and beige Oblique print embroidery throughout, accented with the Christian Dior Paris logo.
This Dior Book Tote handbag showcases Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap for carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Includes box
